message:
feat(instance): add multi-instance awareness and coordination (bv-vrvn)

Add instance lock mechanism to detect and handle multiple bv instances
running on the same repository.

New pkg/instance package:
- Lock type with exclusive file-based locking
- Automatic stale lock detection and cleanup
- Process liveness checking via signal(0)
- LockInfo JSON serialization for lock file metadata

UI integration:
- instanceLock field added to Model struct
- Lock initialized in NewModel when beadsPath is set
- Footer displays warning badge when running as secondary instance
- Lock released in Stop() for graceful cleanup

Features:
- First instance gets exclusive lock
- Secondary instances see warning badge (⚠ PID XXX)
- Dead process locks automatically cleaned up
- 10 unit tests covering all edge cases

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
